content: We can reframe the ICM curiosity mechanism for 2025 autonomous agents to use vector similarity search as its core intrinsic reward engine: an agent gets higher intrinsic reward for exploring environments whose encoded state vectors have low similarity to all vectors in its already-visited state memory store. This turns vector similarity search from a static retrieval tool into a dynamic curiosity driver that scales more efficiently than ICM's traditional prediction-error formulation for high-dimensional open-world environments.
